semantic_subtasks.description: Approach the source side with the EE already horizontal to the ground.
semantic_subtasks.name: pre_grasp_align

semantic_subtasks.description: Slide forward under the virtual tray while preserving a horizontal EE.
semantic_subtasks.name: under_tray_insert_pose

semantic_subtasks.description: Lift the tray without changing the horizontal EE posture.
semantic_subtasks.name: level_lift

semantic_subtasks.description: Carry across the local workspace with the tray plane held level.
semantic_subtasks.name: carry_midline

semantic_subtasks.description: Align with the destination side while preserving the horizontal EE posture.
semantic_subtasks.name: pre_insert_align

semantic_subtasks.description: Settle and hold the destination insertion pose level with low motion.
semantic_subtasks.name: stable_insert_hold
semantic_subtasks.posture_constraint: keep EE tray plane horizontal and low motion

skill_request.boundary_note: This request is intentionally high level. Qwen produced intent; L2/L3 own policy rollout, safety, and joint-level commands.
